julyUpdateCandidates.releaseGate: Create or restore the branch first. On a current-stable-shaped target, dedicated still publishes SERVER_FPS_GUI and monitorServerFPS remains absent; on a docs/source-shaped target, dedicated still publishes SERVER_FPS_GUI plus WFBE_VAR_SERVER_FPS. Hosted/listen exits before active publisher loops; Chernarus and maintained Vanilla parity are named before release wording.

generatedTargetPolicy.defaultReleaseScope: Stable release claims cover source Chernarus plus maintained generated Vanilla Takistan unless a branch-specific audit says otherwise.
generatedTargetPolicy.moddedReleaseGate: Do not claim Modded_Missions support while modded generation is commented, packaging omits Modded_Missions, generated version.sqf files are absent and conflict/bootstrap blockers remain.
generatedTargetPolicy.freshCheckoutGate: Because version.sqf is git-ignored but included by mission boot files, every target mission root needs generated version.sqf verification before pack/test claims.
generatedTargetPolicy.packagingScope: While Tools/LoadoutManager/ZipManager.cs:16 remains unchanged, _MISSIONS.7z packaging is expected to include Missions and Missions_Vanilla, not Modded_Missions.

globalReleaseRule: A fix or branch feature is not release-complete until the target branch is named, Chernarus source carries the intended change, maintained Vanilla carries the same intended change when propagation matters, generated diffs are inspected and the relevant Arma 2 OA smoke is recorded.
